description.canonical: These fish hatch out of translucent pods formed in caverns below the Infested landscape. They hover to feed.
description.display: 这些鱼类从感染地表下形成的半透明卵囊中孵化出来。它们悬游进食。

description.canonical: These fish were purposefully contaminated with the Infestation as an Entrati 'experiment'. They feed off the organic deposits in cave systems.
description.display: 这些鱼作为英择谛的 “实验”，有目的性地接受感染者感染。它们以洞穴系统中的有机沉积物为食。

description.canonical: As ravenous as the Infestation itself, this fish feeds on the remains of others. It shuns the light, preferring an enclosed cave environment.
description.display: 就像感染者本身一样贪婪，这种鱼类以其他同类的残骸为食。它总是避开光线，喜欢封闭的洞穴环境。

description.canonical: Synthetic fibers and a molded foam insole were the basis for what was once a robust and comfortable combat boot. Now, it's a home for tiny aquatic organisms.
description.display: 合成纤维与注塑泡沫制成了的鞋垫，曾经它是一只强韧、舒适的战斗靴。如今，它是小型水生生物体的家。

drops.location: Hallowed Flame Endurance Caches, Rotation A
Hallowed Flame Mission Caches, Rotation A

description.canonical: Developed to perform remote construction and maintenance routines. It can be found in ponds around Venus.
description.display: 被开发用于远程建筑和日常维护。可以在金星的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Its primary function is to reconstruct the bio-material used to regenerate Orokin structures. It can be found in cave pools on Venus.
description.display: 其主要功能是重建用于再生 Orokin 结构的生物材料。可以在金星的洞穴池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Discharges electricity from luminous glands along its flanks to stun its prey.
description.display: 从它侧腹的发光腺体中释放出电流将它的猎物击晕。

description.canonical: A triumph of Orokin bio-engineering, these hardy fish have adapted to the Deimos environment and seem oddly resistant to Infestation. They thrive in cave environments.
description.display: 一项 Orokin 生物工程技术的胜利，这些坚毅的鱼类已经适应了火卫二的环境，并且似乎对感染者有着奇怪的抵抗力。它们在洞穴环境中茁壮成长。

description.canonical: While the Vallis coolant has kept this finely engineered Corpus tactical boot remarkably well preserved, it is, nonetheless, entirely worthless.
description.display: 虽然山谷冷却液将这精心设计的 Corpus 战靴保持得完好无缺，但它，仍没有一丝价值。

description.canonical: Formerly Orokin scavengers, these fish succumbed to the Infestation long ago and now greedily feast on floating spores. They are found all over the surface of Deimos.
description.display: 这些鱼类以前是 Orokin 时代的清道夫，很久以前就屈从感染者了；现在贪婪地吃着漂浮的孢子。它们在火卫二的地表随处可见。

description.canonical: A grotesque crustacean that produces a potent, paralyzing toxin from its tentacles.
description.display: 一种怪异的甲壳动物，能从其触须中产生强力的瘫痪毒素。

description.canonical: A living fossil hearkening back to the Orokin era, this elusive fish hides below the surface of Exocrine pools in the deepest caverns it can find. Unlike Infested fish breeds, it has no ability to hover.
description.display: 一种可以追溯到 Orokin 时代的活化石，这种神出鬼没的鱼类隐藏在洞穴最深处的外分泌液表面之下。不像其它感染者鱼类，它无法进行悬游。

description.canonical: Used to record visual data in the aqua systems and transmits the telemetrics to the Research Station. It can be found in the lake on Venus.
description.display: 用来记录水系统中的视觉数据，并将遥感数据传送回研究站。可以在金星的湖泊中找到。

description.canonical: A surveillance drone that monitors any activity that disturbs the waters. It can be found in ponds around Venus.
description.display: 一种侦查无人机，监视着水体中的任何扰动。可以在金星的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: These specimens were originally parasites, breeding inside the wyrm-guts of Fass and scattered across Deimos in the debris of his explosive demise. They are drawn to his light.
description.display: 这些标本原本是寄生虫，在“混乱”的龙胆内繁殖，并随着其死亡喷射出的爆炸性残骸四散在了火卫二上。它们像飞蛾扑火般被“混乱”的光芒吸引着。

fishProfile.biome: Surface (Hotspot) Best spot: 'The 'Actuary's Pride' (While Fass is up) and "Cerebrum Magna" (While Vome is up)

description.canonical: The Glappid is a scavenger that feasts on the remains of dead fish. It has formed a symbiotic bond with the Seram Beetle which extracts and feeds upon any toxins ingested by the Glappid.
description.display: 盖拉佩德是一种以死鱼残骸为生的食腐动物。它与瑟拉姆甲虫形成了一种共生关系，甲虫将盖拉佩德摄入的毒素析出并以之为食。

description.canonical: These hefty fish are cannibalistic. They rise by Vome's light to absorb rare gases, retreating when Fass ascends to devour their smaller kin in their lairs.
description.display: 这些沉重的鱼类有自相残杀的习性。它们在“秩序”的光照下出现，吸收稀有气体，当“混乱”升起时撤回，吞噬它们巢穴中相对幼小的同族。

description.canonical: A predatory fish that is attracted to the scent of blood.
description.display: 一种被血的气味吸引的捕食鱼类。

description.canonical: Haav prefer to swim near the surface. Duviri citizens often mistake them for logs, which can be startling when Haav show their fangs.
description.display: 浮伤鱼喜欢在靠近水面的地方游。双衍王境的公民经常把它们误认为木头，当浮伤鱼露出它们的尖牙时，可能会让人大吃一惊。

description.canonical: Some theorize that Duviri stands upon the shell of a giant Inaak. Naturally, some wonder what the giant Inaak stands upon. The answer, of course, is other Inaaks, all the way down.
description.display: 有些理论认为，双衍王境坐落在一只巨大的载世龟壳上。自然而然地，一些人会想知道巨大的载世龟是站在什么之上的。答案当然是其他载世龟，一个接一个叠到底部。

description.canonical: A crustacean that hunts during the twilight hours.
description.display: 一种甲壳纲动物，在黄昏时分捕猎。

description.canonical: A poisonous fish protected by a hardened carapace around its skull.
description.display: 一种有毒的鱼，被其头骨外的坚硬外壳保护。

description.canonical: Identifies organic threats to Corpus operations in the Aqua Systems and eliminates them. It can be found in the lake on Venus.
description.display: 识别水系统中对 Corpus 行动有危害的有机物，并将其消灭。可以在金星的湖泊中找到。

description.canonical: The Infestation has suborned these fish to its own purposes, using them as antibodies to repel the non-Infested. They swim through and above the Exocrine found on Deimos’ surface.
description.display: 感染者唆使这些鱼类达成自己的目的，把它们当作抗体来对抗非感染者。它们游走于火卫二地表上的内分泌液内和其上方。

description.canonical: A muscular, three-tailed fish, the Lobotriscid trawls through Exocrine vapor across the surface of Deimos when Vome is dominant.
description.display: 这是一种肌肉发达的三尾鱼，当“秩序”在天空中占主导地位时，三尾额叶鲤会通过外分泌雾化膜在火卫二的地面拖网捕食。

description.canonical: Repairs leaks and clear blockages within the aqua systems. It can be found in the lake on Venus.
description.display: 修复水系统中的泄露，清除淤塞。可以在金星的湖泊中找到。

description.canonical: Its gaping maw allows it to scoop up smaller fish as it swims by them.
description.display: 它张大的嘴使得它游过其他小鱼时可以一口将之吞下。

description.canonical: Surveys the water for impurities. It can be found in cave pools on Venus.
description.display: 侦测水中的杂质。可以在金星洞穴的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Displays blood-spattered pattern on its scales and has its ribs exposed through open cavities along both flanks. When predators approach it lies still at the bottom of the sand banks, disguised as a carcass in hopes of being ignored.
description.display: 它的鱼鳞上有着血溅的纹样，其肋骨通过空腔暴露在两侧。当捕食者接近时，它一动不动地躺在沙岸底部，伪装成尸体，寄希望于被忽视。

description.canonical: A cunning hunter that hides within the mud at the bottom of the ocean and ambushes passing prey.
description.display: 一个狡猾的猎手，躲藏在湖底的泥中，伏击路过的猎物。

description.canonical: This exceptionally rare breed of fish is almost extinct, as its gilded Orokin flesh has a special savor for predators. It warily conceals itself in caves.
description.display: 这种异常罕见的鱼种几乎要绝迹了，它那镀金的 Orokin 鱼肉对掠食者来说有别具一格的味道。它小心翼翼地躲在洞穴里。

description.canonical: The Namaes has evolved the ability to tense its tail muscles and use its tail as a fearsome weapon.
description.display: 纳土鲉已经进化出收紧尾部肌肉的能力，并把它的尾巴当成一种可怕的武器。

description.canonical: This fish inhabits the shallows and feeds of crabs and other small crustaceans. When threatened it forces air into its brain to give it the impression of being much bigger than it normally is.
description.display: 这种鱼栖息在浅水，以螃蟹及其他小型甲壳类为食。当受到威胁时，它会将空气挤入脑部，令其看起来比正常要大得多。

drops.location: Hallowed Flame Endurance Caches, Rotation A
Hallowed Flame Mission Caches, Rotation A

description.canonical: Crammed with redundant, mutated internal organs, this pungent fish mingles Orokin and Infested ancestry. It is confined to the Exocrine and is only active by the light of the Wyrm Fass.
description.display: 体内挤满了多余的、变异的内脏，这种刺鼻的鱼类混有 Orokin 和感染者的血统。其活动区域仅限于外分泌液，并且只有在蛟龙“混乱”的光照下才会在出现。

description.canonical: Facilitates long-distance communication between robotics deployed in the aqua systems. It can be found in the ponds around Venus.
description.display: 用于加强水系统中机器人之间的远距沟通性能。可以在金星上的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Collects fluid samples in the aqua system for the Research Station. It can be found in lakes around Venus.
description.display: 为研究站收集水系统中的液体样本。可以在金星周围的湖泊中找到。

description.canonical: Analyzes the growth of microbes dwelling in the aqua systems to monitor toxicity levels. It can be found in cave pools on Venus.
description.display: 分析居住在水系统中的微生物的生长情况，以监测毒性等级。可以在金星的洞穴池塘中找到。

description.canonical: The Seonn’s ability to flare its neck and hood makes it impossible for most predators to swallow, but the Golden Maw can overcome its defense.
description.display: 精灵鱼的颈部和头鳍可以伸展，让大多数的捕食者无法吞咽，但是黄金喉兽可以攻克它的防御。

description.canonical: While rarely venturing from the deepest waters of the plains, the Sharrac is a fearsome predator who will prey on unwary Ostrons swimming alone.
description.display: 尽管很少从深水中冒险游出，鲨客是可怕的捕食者，会捕食单独游泳的粗心 Ostron 人。

description.canonical: You're catching a lot of these. Are you stocking up?
description.display: 你捕获了很多这玩意。你是在囤货吗？

description.canonical: Monitors environmental fluctuations. It can be found in the cave pools on Venus.
description.display: 监控环境波动。它可以在金星的洞穴池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Repairs robotics that have broken down in the aqua systems. It can be found in ponds around Venus.
description.display: 修复在水系统中发生故障的机器人。可以在金星的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Strong, predatory fish with eyes that can pierce the darkest shadows.
description.display: 强壮的捕食者，视力优异，足以看透最暗的阴影。

description.canonical: Programmed to break down chemical byproducts leaked into the aqua system. It can be found in ponds around Venus.
description.display: 被设置用来分解渗入水环境的化学副产物。可以在金星的池塘中找到。

description.canonical: Whatever higher functions this fish once had have been consumed, leaving it a mere automaton of metal and flesh. It ekes out a primitive existence in cave systems.
description.display: 无论这种鱼类曾经有什么更高等的功能，都已经被消耗掉了。只剩下自动化的金属和肉体。它在洞穴系统中勉强维持着原始的习性。

description.canonical: The Golden Maw finds Xirans exceptionally delicious.
description.display: 黄金喉兽发现息壤鲳特别美味。

description.canonical: This slow fish meanders through the waters and is often preyed upon by larger predators.
description.display: 这种缓慢地鱼在水体间游荡，时常被更大的捕食者捕食。
